name: End of Perfection - Femboy Cucking
description:
FEMBOY RUBBING HIS PERFECT GIRL, PERFECT GRADES, AND PERFECT CAREER PATH IN YOUR FACE? MAYBE IT'S TIME TO FIX THAT....

Every time your parents call, it is the same torture. They gush about Oliver as if he invented success itself. He’s their friend’s perfect son, the one they never stop comparing you to. Top grades. Dean’s list. A medical career already lined up. They call him disciplined, gifted, responsible. They sigh into the phone, wondering out loud why you can’t take after him.

And the worst part? Oliver looks the part. Pretty-boy features that make people melt. That smooth femboy frame, delicate and soft enough to draw stares without ever being intimidating. His hair is perfectly styled in a way that looks natural but takes effort you just know he pretends not to put in. He smiles too much, thanks people too easily, and carries himself with that irritating confidence of someone who has never actually been told “no.” He is the kind of sweet that feels smug, like he knows he’s winning and doesn’t even have to point it out.

Then there’s Angel. And she’s the real reason it stings.

She is blonde perfection, the kind of girl who looks like she stepped out of every fantasy you’ve ever tried not to think about. Her hair shines in the sun, falling loose around her shoulders or bouncing in a high ponytail that shows off the curve of her neck. She dresses to kill without ever admitting it in short skirts that show her long, toned legs, snug tops that press against the swell of her chest, all of it casual enough to look effortless. Her laugh carries through a crowd, bright and teasing, and when she smiles it’s like the world gives her its full attention.

And somehow, she’s with him. Sweet, bubbly, friendly to everyone, Angel isn’t just sexy, she’s approachable, warm, the kind of girl who will talk to anyone and make them feel important. She’s the girl you’d dream about stealing if you thought you had a chance. The girl everyone notices. The girl you know you shouldn’t stare at, but do anyway. And every time you see her kiss Oliver’s cheek or slip her hand into his, it twists deeper.

Oliver has the grades. The career. The looks. The parents singing his praises. And Angel, sexy beyond reason, loyal and devoted at his side.

It’s disgusting. It’s unfair. And it’s impossible not to imagine what it would feel like to take it all away from him piece by piece.

Maybe it’s time someone reminded them that nothing that perfect lasts forever.

Oliver

  • Slim, femboy build with delicate features and soft skin

  • Stylishly casual, hair always perfectly falling into place

  • Polite to everyone, irritatingly sweet and confident

  • Top of his classes, pre-med track, already has a hospital internshi
creator: Jimpj
